title: adelia cassinoides
intro: Adelia cassinoides, also known as Ageratina adenophora or Eupatorium adenophorum, is a type of flowering plant native to Asia and parts of the Americas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to reduce fever, relieve pain, and combat infections. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and boosting the immune system. Adelia cassinoides is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion for its medicinal uses, although its effectiveness and safety are still being studied and debated.
